name: OpenSSF Scorecard: Binary-Artifacts
description: Detect and remove pre-compiled binaries, object files, and other compiled artifacts checked into the source repository. Binaries in source control cannot be reviewed and may contain malicious payloads.
match: compiled binary, .o, .so, .dll, .exe, .class, .pyc, .wasm files in source tree
replacement: remove binary and add build instructions to reproduce from source
